summary: Frontend-only verification of the 4 Vibify refinements (Services 9th CTA tile, Reveal reduced-motion safety, Footer Services with all 8 links, richer hero aurora) plus regression of nav/dropdown/forms. All target flows pass against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.

issues: Reveal/framer-motion variants are correctly gated by useReducedMotion (Services.jsx lines 16-17 set initial=false when reduced). Manual scroll-through confirmed every section (#stats, #services, #work, #process, #footer) ends at computed opacity:1, visibility:visible, display:block. Hero, testimonials, CTA section IDs are not on the <section> element itself (no #hero / #testimonials / #cta found via getElementById) — purely cosmetic naming; the Hero, Testimonials and CTASection components render fully (verified visually in screenshot). Recommend adding id="hero"/"testimonials"/"cta" on the section elements for parity with the other anchors and to keep anchor-deeplinks (e.g., /#hero) future-proof.

Company column 'About' anchor points to /#process (Footer.jsx line 20). Works as a smooth-scroll to the process section, but the label/target mismatch (About vs Process) can confuse users. Either rename the section to 'About' or change the label to 'Process'.

Rich animated aurora is rendered (purple/magenta/teal blurred orbs visible) — visually matches the brief. HeroBackground element has no data-testid (e.g. data-testid="hero-background") which makes automated assertions on the new visual rely on indirect signals. Low-priority polish: add a stable testid for testability.

action_items: (Optional) Add id="hero", id="testimonials", id="cta" on the corresponding <section> elements so the footer/in-page anchor strategy is uniform.
(Optional) Rename Footer Company 'About' link or change its target — currently labels 'About' but points to #process.
(Optional) Add data-testid="hero-background" to the HeroBackground root for easier visual regression testing.
Pre-existing WordReveal whitespace issue (Hero.jsx + ServicePage.jsx) flagged in iterations 1 & 2 is still open.
critical_code_review_comments: Services.jsx (104 lines) is clean: cardVariants honors useReducedMotion via cardInitial; 9th tile reuses the same animation pattern and shares the onTalk handler from Landing.jsx — perfect single-source-of-truth for the ContactDialog.
Footer.jsx imports services directly from data/services and iterates – fully data-driven; adding a 9th service automatically appears in the footer with the correct slug-based testid. Good.
Landing.jsx passes openTalk to BOTH <Services/> and <Footer/> with shared ContactDialog state – no duplicate dialog instances. Solid.

Reveal.jsx reduced-motion behavior is now mirrored inline in Services.jsx (cardInitial = reduced ? false : 'hidden'). If this pattern is repeated across many components, consider centralizing in Reveal/useRevealProps to avoid drift.
All 8 footer-service-<slug> testids match exactly the slugs in data/services.js; no orphaned testids.

success_rate.backend: n/a (frontend-only retest; backend POST /api/contact + POST /api/booking confirmed working via UI submissions)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on requested scenarios: 8 service cards visible, services-cta-tile visible, CTA opens contact-dialog with name/email/message inputs, all 8 footer-service-<slug> links visible with correct labels and navigation (verified for proptech and brand-strategy), Footer Company links present with correct hrefs (/#services, /#work, /#process, /#footer), footer logo navigates to /, stats count-up animates and shows digits, all sections render opacity:1 (no opacity:0 stuck), nav Services dropdown opens on hover and dropdown-<slug> items are present, contact submit (POST /api/contact) shows contact-success, booking submit (POST /api/booking) shows contact-success, newsletter submit transitions to Check icon.

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ContactSubmission via services-cta-tile (TEST_cta_<ts>@example.com), TEST_BookingSubmission via CTA section (TEST_booking_<ts>@example.com), and TEST_Newsletter (TEST_news_<ts>@example.com). All TEST_-prefixed and safe to leave; consistent with iteration_2 strategy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://vibify-bold.preview.emergentagent.com. Smooth scroll is enabled; allow 400-800ms after navigation for framer-motion AnimatePresence mode='wait' transitions before asserting service-page-<slug>. The services grid now has 9 tiles total (8 service-card-0..7 + services-cta-tile). The CTA tile and Footer 'Or just say hello' button (footer-talk-button) both call openTalk() in Landing.jsx → opens the SAME ContactDialog in 'contact' mode (testids contact-dialog/contact-name-input/contact-email-input/contact-message-input/contact-submit-button/contact-success). Section IDs hero/testimonials/cta are NOT present on their sections; use the testids hero-section / [data-testid] instead. Stats count-up takes ~2s to settle.
rca of the issue: No bugs reproduced for the 4 refinements. All requested testids and behaviors verified.
